analysis: The project has multiple HTML/CSS/JS files across different directories (test-website, github-page, docs). The event.json indicates a black hole theme with bulk animated objects, slides, and animated pages. The existing to-dos mention incomplete CSS for cosmic/dark themes, missing animations, and broken SVG data URLs. The current state appears to be a work-in-progress with fragmented implementations across directories.

improvements.description: Complete the cosmic black hole theme with dark background, animated swirling patterns, glowing particle effects, and smooth transitions for all interactive elements.
Add animated slide sections with black hole visuals, interactive planet elements, and smooth scroll animations for the animated page experience.
Implement bulk animated objects with particle systems, black hole gravity effects, and smooth slide transitions for the animated page functionality.
Apply the same black hole cosmic theme with animated backgrounds and interactive elements to maintain consistency across the github-page directory.
Update the docs directory with the black hole theme, including animated SVG patterns and cosmic color schemes for visual consistency.
